electrical_characteristics.conditions: VOUT ≥ 1 V, PFM mode, max is 2% + 20 mV

electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Forward current limit (peak for each switching cycle)
Negative current limit per phase (peak for each switching cycle)

electrical_characteristics.conditions: Each phase, between VIN_Bx and SW_Bx pins, I = 1 A
Each phase, between SW_Bx and PGND_Bx pins, I = 1 A
From ENx to VOUT = 0.35 V, COUT_TOTAL = 44 µF/phase
From VANA and VIN_Bx pins, NRST = 0 V, VANA = VIN_Bx = 3.7 V
From VANA and VIN_Bx pins, NRST = 1.8 V, VANA = VIN_Bx = 3.7 V, regulators disabled

pin_definitions.description: Output voltage feedback (positive) for the BUCK2 converter.
Programmable enable signal for the buck regulators (can be also configured to select between two buck output voltage levels). This pin functions alternatively as GPIO3.
External clock input. Connect this pin to ground if the external clock is not used.
Ground
Serial interface clock input for I2C access. Connect this pin to a pullup resistor.
Serial interface data input and output for I2C access. Connect this pin to a pullup resistor.
Programmable enable signal for the buck regulators (can be also configured to select between two buck output voltage levels). This pin functions alternatively as GPIO1.
Output voltage feedback (positive) for the BUCK0 converter.
Input for the BUCK0 converter. The separate power pins, VIN_Bx, are not connected together internally. The VIN_Bx pins must be connected together in the application and be locally bypassed.
BUCK0 switch node
Power ground for the BUCK0 and BUCK1 converters
BUCK1 switch node
Input for the BUCK1 converter. The separate power pins, VIN_Bx, are not connected together internally. The VIN_Bx pins must be connected together in the application and be locally bypassed.
Output voltage feedback (positive) for the BUCK1 converter. This pin functions alternatively as the output ground feedback (negative) for the BUCK0 converter.
Programmable enable signal for the buck regulators (can be also configured to select between two buck output voltage levels). This pin functions alternatively as GPIO2.
Power-good indication signal
Supply voltage for the analog and digital blocks. This pin must be connected to the same node as VIN_Bx.
Open-drain interrupt output. This pin is active low.
Reset signal for the device
Output voltage feedback (positive) for the BUCK3 converter. This pin functions alternatively as the output ground feedback (negative) for the BUCK2 converter.
Input for the BUCK3 converter. The separate power pins, VIN_Bx, are not connected together internally. The VIN_Bx pins must be connected together in the application and be locally bypassed.
BUCK3 switch node
Power ground for the BUCK2 and BUCK3 converters
BUCK2 switch node
Input for the BUCK2 converter. The separate power pins, VIN_Bx, are not connected together internally. The VIN_Bx pins must be connected together in the application and be locally bypassed.
